commands.review_summary:
The PR changes `src/commands/status.format.ts` so sub-1000 status token counts render as rounded integers and adds boundary/cache status formatter tests.

PR surface: Source +2, Tests +30. Total +32 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source: current main formats `formatKTokens(999)` via `(999 / 1000).toFixed(1) + 'k'`, and the status command routes session/cache summaries through that helper. I did not run a command-level repro because this review is read-only.
